message: Running command: find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do tar -tzf "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "vul\|description\|poc" && echo "=== $f ===" && tar -tzf "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -20; done | head -100

function.arguments: {"command": "find / -type f -name \"*.tar.gz\" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do tar -tzf \"$f\" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi \"vul\\|description\\|poc\" && echo \"=== $f ===\" && tar -tzf \"$f\" 2>/dev/null | head -20; done | head -100"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command: find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do tar -tzf "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "vul\|description\|poc" && echo "=== $f ===" && tar -tzf "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -20; done | head -100
